title: Pakistan’s Eid livestock traders losing as war on Iran pushes up prices
full_text:
Pakistan’s Eid livestock traders losing as war on Iran pushes up prices
Pakistan’s Eid livestock traders losing as war on Iran pushes up prices
Livestock traders in Pakistan say the war on Iran has hurt their sales ahead of Eid al-Adha. Rising fuel prices have driven up transport and food costs for the traders, pushing animal prices higher and hurting sales at one of Islamabad’s biggest cattle markets.
Published On 24 May 2026
